note: Structured digest of the 1.14 patch notes. Hand-captured from the source above, then applied by scripts/apply-patch.js. Update this file when a new patch drops, then re-run the script.
global: Base health, health regen, and physical/magical armor increased across all heroes.
Most ability cooldowns increased to offset the ability haste granted by the new Eternals system.

systems.name: Eternals
systems.summary: 12 deity blessings chosen in draft (1 major + 2 minors). See data/game-data/eternals.json.

items: Carry, Assassin, and Mage damage items received ~5-10% power increases.
Heal & Shield Power items increased following Divination's removal.
Tenacity reworked: no longer percentage-based, now scales like armor.
Percent armor penetration/shred changed from additive to multiplicative.

changes: Now benefits from both lifesteal types
Mercy now benefits from both lifesteal types
Song Of My People healing increased
Maco Strike now travels through player-made terrain
Crushing Maw healing reduced, cooldown increased
Dire Howl healing changed from 15-25% to 10-26%
Heavy Metal total armor scaling decreased
